decision.summary: No new action: the thesis-aligned daily 79k reach and weekly 80k reach are already live, so the book is expressing the Beecthor setup cleanly without needing secondary slots.
decision.rationale: Reconciliation is clean and the 10:00 cycle entries are now active in the account: the daily 79k reach and the weekly 80k reach. Binance spot is 78306.0, still holding the continuation structure above 76k that the latest Beecthor thesis described as compatible with a push into the 79k-80k zone before any larger exhaustion. Those two positions already cover the default thesis-aligned portfolio construction: one daily thesis slot and one weekly thesis slot. The remaining old weekly 72k dip is still open only as a discarded_for_slot legacy position and does not block anything. Under the updated strategy, secondary daily/weekly slots should stay empty unless price is showing a very clear non-thesis trend that the main Beecthor expression is not capturing. That is not the case here. No open position is in the 90-95% take-profit zone, and forcing extra exposure would dilute the new discipline rather than improve it.
